notes: No independent practice website exists (known_website was null; extensive search found only directory/aggregator listings - Healthgrades, WebMD, Vitals, Yelp, opencare, dentalplans, ADA finder). A minimal Facebook business page ('Kulig Glen J DDS') is the only owned web presence and confirms just the name/credential, with no team roster, ownership statement, or hiring content. Solo 1-provider practice per census; call (815) 485-8188 directly to inquire about openings. [Fable QA 2026-07-08] Downgraded roster_verified -> no_usable_website: sole source is a minimal Facebook page (website_status=social_only), which per the decision tree cannot count as a website-verified roster. Dr. Glen J. Kulig, DDS confirmed by that page and directories, but not website-verified.

Census known_website 'barringtonsmiledental.com' does not resolve (dead/wrong domain); actual live site is barringtonsmiles.dental, branded 'Barrington Smiles.' Sole listed dentist is Dr. Milad Saad, matching the corporate registrant name (CA Saad Inc), though the site never explicitly states he is the owner. Census street address (1410 S Barrington Rd) differs from the site's listed address (16 Executive Court, South Barrington, IL 60010) but the phone number matches exactly, so it is very likely the same practice at an updated address. No careers page or openings exist on the site.

Census known_website 'Lockportsmiles.Net' does not resolve (DNS failure) — real official site is lockportdentalgroup.net, found via search. Practice states it has served Lockport 'for over 60 years' but names no owner/founder explicitly. Site lists 3 dentists (Gerhard since 1993, Hasan since 2023, Mustafa) vs census provider_count of 5 — 2 providers may be missing from the site or counted as hygienists/other staff. No careers page or hiring link found anywhere on the site.

owner_operator_stated: Indexed site content states Dr. Nicola Hill founded ABC Dentistry in 1991; her daughter Dr. Samantha Mueller later joined after assisting there in high school -- a family-owned, single-practice narrative with no DSO/group ever mentioned.
notes: IMPORTANT CAVEAT: direct WebFetch of abcdds.com returned HTTP 403 (bot protection) on every attempted page/protocol (root, about-us, meet-the-dentists, contact-us, http and https variants), so the roster above is reconstructed from search-engine-indexed snippets of those exact pages, not a directly rendered fetch -- treat as strong-but-unconfirmed and re-verify by phone/visit. No careers/jobs page was found on the practice's own site; Indeed lists open Dental Assistant/Receptionist roles (and possibly Associate Dentist) for ABC Dentistry, but these are third-party postings not confirmed on-site, so excluded from openings. Appears to be a genuine independent, family-owned pediatric/general practice (founded 1991, mother-daughter dentist team) with no DSO affiliation found anywhere -- consistent with the census's single_loc_group tier.

owner_operator_stated: No explicit 'owned by' statement is quoted anywhere on the site. Homepage states the practice has 'been serving the Barrington area for over 30 years,' and the team page presents only these two same-surname dentists (III and IV, implying a father/son practice), with no DSO or group branding anywhere on the site.
notes: Only 2 dentists appear on the site (both named Fitton, likely father/son) vs. census provider_count of 4 -- the gap is likely hygienists/staff counted in the census figure but not shown on this bare-bones site, rather than unlisted associates. No careers page exists (/careers/ and /about/ both 404); site has minimal content beyond the homepage and meet-us page. No DSO branding anywhere, consistent with the census single_loc_group tag, though the site never makes an explicit ownership statement to confirm it.

Known website curtlangdds.com no longer resolves (DNS failure). Nelson, DDS at the same suite -- this is directionally consistent with the census network_id (ao:NELSON_DAVID) suggesting Nelson may now operate it, but it is unconfirmed since no site content could be loaded. Recommend a phone call to confirm the practice is still operating and who currently owns/leads it.

owner_operator_stated: Our Story page: founded 1946 by Dr. Romeo Pallotto, passed through Pallotto family generations (Dr. Anthony Pallotto and Dr. Josephine Pallotto joined 2011), then starting 2022 Dr. Jee Sun Kim, Dr. Jun Soo Shin, and Dr. Eric Kim joined; no single current owner is explicitly named, described as Pallotto/Kim-Shin families operating collaboratively.
notes: Old domain pallottodentalcare.com 301-redirects to smilesformilesdental.com; practice rebranded from 'Pallotto Dental Care' to 'Smiles For Miles.' Census network_id 'ao:PALLOTTO' reflects the legacy family name, not a DSO — site's own history describes a family-founded independent practice, and no Pallotto doctor appears on the current 'Meet The Doctors' roster (now Shin/Kim/Kim), suggesting a generational handoff rather than corporate acquisition. No working careers page found.

owner_operator_stated: The /about page states the practice has been run by Dr. Wirtz since 1987 ("creating beautiful smiles ... since 1987"), implying he is owner/founder, but gives no first name or credentials on-page.
notes: known_website on file (drondoy.com) is wrong — it belongs to an unrelated general/family dentist (Dr. Arel Ondoy, DMD) in Palos Heights, not an orthodontist in Oak Forest. Phone on file ((708) 535-0333) differs from the number shown in third-party search results for this practice ((708) 564-4286) — worth confirming by call.

owner_operator_stated: No explicit ownership sentence appears on any page, but every page on the site (including Dr. Hassan's own bio page) carries the title/branding 'Glen Perio - Dr. Joshua Hassan,' strongly implying he is the practice's namesake/owner.

Parikh D.D.S., P.C. in Olympia Fields, IL 60461 could be found; only third-party directory listings exist (Healthgrades, WebMD, ADA, NPI registry), several of which now show Parikh practicing elsewhere (e.g. a Chicago-area FQHC). owner_operator_stated: "As a privately owned, local business with Dr. Aggie as the only owner, Hart Dental provides personalized, trusted, and high-quality dental care for every member of the family." Site brands as 'Cornerstone Dentistry' (domain cornerstonecosmeticdentistry.com) and names only Dr. Harman Kaur, DDS as the featured dentist plus assistants/office staff; no ownership/founder statement and no mention of 'Rehman Syed' anywhere despite census network_id ao:REHMAN_SYED — this location may be one site in a multi-location dentist-owner's portfolio where Kaur is the on-site clinician. Site brands as 'Brighter Dental of Chicago' with three locations (Old Town at 1254 N Wells St -- matches this location's zip 60610 -- plus South Loop and Park Ridge), consistent with census ownership_tier 'dentist_multi' and network_id ao:NOUNEH_ROGER. owner_operator_stated: Site states Dr. Jacqueline Rosen practiced 40+ years then, in late 2019, 'entrusted her daughter, Dr. Kristina [Sakas Katz], and her associate, Dr. Ben [Belavsky], with taking over the practice' so she could focus on teaching at UIC College of Dentistry. Confirms census dentist_multi tier (2 locations). Only 3 named doctors vs census provider_count of 4. owner_operator_stated: Dr. Manpreet Singh's bio page states he has been 'providing comprehensive dental care for my patients at York Towne Dental since I opened the office in 2006.'

The real site is yvdental.net, branded 'York Towne Dental,' individually founded and owned by Dr. Manpreet Singh since 2006 (consistent with census true-independent classification), with a second dentist, Dr. Patel (DMD). owner_operator_stated: Site states "Ben Topaz, Owner of GCDL" (in the field since 1999) and describes the business as "Family Owned & Managed."
notes: This is a B2B dental laboratory (crowns, bridges, dentures, implants made FOR other dentists), not a patient-facing dental practice. There is no clinical doctor roster to verify and it is not a viable associate-dentist hiring lead. Census likely mis-tagged this location (provider_count:1 suggests it was scraped as if it were a GP office); recommend flagging for reclassification/removal rather than treating as a job lead. Owner Ben Topaz is a dental lab technician, not a DDS.

owner_operator_stated: "For over a decade, Dr. Krikor (Koko) Papazian, and his team of dentists, have been protecting and restoring smiles" — site presents Papazian (title: President) as founder/owner, with associates who joined his practice (Barlas in 2024 after 32 years solo, Titus in 2022 after 27 years solo).
notes: DBA was <UNAVAIL> in census; site brands simply as 'New Age Dental' (Morton Grove). Single-owner-led practice (Papazian) that has been absorbing solo practitioners as associates — consistent with census single_loc_group/no network_id. 4 named doctors vs census provider_count of 5. /careers/ returns 404 and no hiring nav link exists — no job openings on the practice's own site.

Site is technically broken, not just unresponsive to our fetcher: verified at the network level with repeated curl attempts that the canonical https://www.drnicorata.com/ endpoint fails TLS handshake (SSL_ERROR_SYSCALL) consistently, and the bare https://drnicorata.com/ (which does load, WordPress/PHP 8.4) force-redirects to the broken www host, so ordinary visitors hitting this domain hit a dead end. Because the page could never actually be loaded, no on-site facts could be extracted — third-party search snippets suggest the practice may involve a Dr. Steven Nicorata and a Dr. Greg Nicorata, but that is unverified (not from the practice's own site) and is NOT included in the doctors list per the no-fabrication rule. A phone call is required; do not rely on this domain for outreach until its SSL/hosting is fixed.

Site is live and address matches the census record exactly, but the site brands itself 'Signature Smiles' while census calls it 'Family Dental Care' — likely a DBA/rebrand, worth reconciling. Site lists 3 dentists (Soni, Shah, Verma) vs. census provider_count of 1. No careers/jobs page exists; job seekers would need to call (847) 324-9428 directly.

No official practice website exists. known_website (carecredit.com) is an aggregator, not a real site. Perisin's real, independently-found practice is 'St. Charles Family Dentistry' at 516 E Main St, St. Charles, IL 60174, (630) 377-3131, where he is listed as owner alongside 2 associates. Simple template site (nav limited to About/Services/Appointment Check-in/Virtual Care/Patient Paperwork/Contact, no careers link) names only two dentists - Dr. Rutherford Simmons and Dr. Malika Shariff - with no credentials or ownership statement given; site states the practice has served Oak Lawn families since 1986. Could not extract any content: prairiewalkdentalofoakpark.com and its apparent parent multi-location brand site prairiewalkdental.com (Lisle-based) both returned HTTP 403 on every fetch attempt (www and bare domain), and web.archive.org is not reachable from this tool. Fine D.D.S. and Associates, LTD.' Search-engine cache snippets still reference Dr. Cecala's bio and Yelp/LinkedIn suggest the practice may still be operating physically as of 2026, so a call to confirm is warranted rather than assuming closure from the dead website alone.

owner_operator_stated: Site's meet-the-doctors page states Dr. Vu Kong established High Point Dentistry in 2009 and identifies him as 'CEO & Owner,' a third-generation dentist, running the practice across its Elgin, Schaumburg, and Chicago locations.
notes: CONFLICT: this Elgin location (legal name 'Fortress Dental Corporation') operates publicly as 'High Point Dentistry,' a 3-location IL group (Elgin, Schaumburg, Chicago) centrally owned by Dr. Vu Kong (site: CEO & Owner) -- this contradicts the census single_loc_group/no-network tag; recommend re-tiering as a multi-location owner-operator group. The 5-doctor Elgin staff roster matches census provider_count exactly, confirming correct location match. Careers page exists but currently states 'No open positions currently' -- worth periodic recheck. The corporate name 'Fortress Dental Corporation' does not appear anywhere on the site itself, only inferable via directory listings sharing the 1350 E Chicago St Unit 4, Elgin address.

owner_operator_stated: Careers page identifies the practice as part of 'Elite Dental Partners LLC' and describes joining 'an Elite Team'; homepage does not name an individual owner.

Careers page confirms group/DSO branding (Elite Dental Partners LLC) consistent with the census's single_loc_group tier, but lists no specific open titles itself — it funnels applicants to an external Greenhouse job board, so no openings could be sourced from the practice's own pages. [Fable QA 2026-07-08] Corrected consistent -> conflict: Elite Dental Partners LLC is a Chicago-based DSO managing 75+ practices; DSO affiliation on the practice's own careers page contradicts the census single_loc_group (dentist-owned) tier. Census re-tier candidate (stealth/branded DSO review), same pattern as the Setty/Smile Partners USA conflict.

owner_operator_stated: Indexed bio states Dr. Tirumalasetty ("Dr. Setty") graduated dental school in 1997 and established her own practice in the Chicago Loop in 2000; the practice's Indeed employer profile states its providers get 'the resources and administrative support' of Smile Partners USA 'while maintaining the feel and autonomy of a local practice.'

Third-party job boards show a Registered Dental Hygienist listing (Glassdoor) and an Associate Dentist search reference (Indeed), but these are not confirmed on the practice's own site, so excluded from openings.

owner_operator_stated: No on-site ownership statement could be extracted (page appears to be a JS-rendered SPA that returned only its title tag). Third-party press (PRNewswire, Crain's Chicago Business, Beringea) independently describes Dentologie as a VC-backed dental group (Dentologie Enterprises, Inc., $25M Series B) expanding across Chicagoland.
notes: IMPORTANT MISMATCH: this location_id is named 'David Drake DDS' but the known_website is Dentologie's corporate page for 963 W Belmont Ave — a VC-backed multi-location DSO. Third-party listings (Lakeview East Chamber of Commerce, Yelp) place the actual 'David B. Drake, DDS LTD' solo practice at a different address, 739 W Belmont Ave, and explicitly say he has 'no website.' This looks like a census data-matching error rather than Dentologie having acquired Drake's practice. No doctor roster could be confirmed at either address since Dentologie's site content is JS-rendered and didn't return past the title tag. Job-hunters should call ahead to clarify which entity actually occupies which address before assuming Dentologie/DSO employment terms apply. [Fable QA 2026-07-08] Downgraded hiring_page_found -> no_usable_website and cleared website/openings fields: the researcher's own evidence shows dentologie.com belongs to Dentologie (VC-backed DSO at 963 W Belmont), while this location is David B. Drake DDS LTD, a solo practice third-party-listed at 739 W Belmont with no website. Attributing Dentologie's hiring portal to Drake's record would be false. Census website-field correction queued.

owner_operator_stated: Site states the practice is "Led by Dr. Robin Ferguson, Dr. Yetta McCullom, Dr. Cornell McCullom, Dr. Briana McGee, and Dr. Noelle McCullom." The same page also lists two distinct phone/entity lines verbatim: "(773) 488-3738 -- Drs. McCullom PC" and "(773) 488-9075 -- Dr. Ferguson DD," indicating the practice is actually split between two separate legal entities sharing one brand and location.
notes: Doctor count (5) matches census provider_count. No DSO/corporate branding on site -- reads as independent. However the site itself (verified verbatim) shows two separate legal entities, 'Drs. McCullom PC' and 'Dr. Ferguson DD', operating under the shared brand -- census names Yetta McCullom as the LLC's sole member, but a job seeker should clarify which entity would actually be the employer of record before applying. No careers page found (checked /careers/, 404).

Census known_website 'ddentalgroup.com' (DuPage Dental Group) 301-redirects to napervilledentalstudios.com; the site confirms the rebrand, stating 'Since 2018, Naperville Dental Studios, formerly known as DuPage Dental Group, has been proud to serve the Naperville community.' No owner/founder name or DSO affiliation is stated anywhere (footer copyright is under the practice's own name), though the rename plus a footer reference to a second 'Dental Services in Warrenville, IL' location is worth a follow-up call to confirm current ownership. Census lists provider_count=5 but only 2 dentists (Dr. Jignesh Patel DDS, Dr. Shaan Baig DMD) are named on the site; no careers page or openings exist.

owner_operator_stated: The /about page states Dr. Adam C. Szatkowski took over the practice from his father and founder, Dr. Frank R. Szatkowski, who established it in 1972, and that Adam now leads the practice.
notes: The raw homepage fetch rendered stray casino/gambling text mixed in with legitimate dental copy (likely an ad-injection or caching artifact) — worth a manual spot-check, but every subpage (about, meet-our-doctors, join-our-team) is clean and clearly Eagle Falls' own site. The 5-doctor roster matches the census provider_count exactly. Practice is now second-generation family-owned (Szatkowski, founded 1972) and is actively hiring across dentist/hygienist/assistant/front-office roles; the careers copy mentions 'five locations,' so confirm this specific Bloomingdale office still has an opening before applying. [Fable QA 2026-07-08] Upgraded roster_verified -> hiring_page_found: the practice's own join-our-team page lists Dentist openings, which per the lane tree outranks roster-only verification. Full 5-doctor roster retained on the record.

public_practice_name: Jeffrey Cheung DDS and Associates PC
owner_operator_stated: Site lists Jeffrey Cheung, DDS as 'Owner/Lead Dentist' of this single Aurora office.
notes: IMPORTANT DATA ISSUE: the input known_website (advancedfamilydental.com) is WRONG for this location — that domain belongs to an unrelated group ('Chicagoland Smile Group,' per its Paylocity careers link) with locations in Crest Hill/Frankfort/Lockport/Shorewood and no Aurora address or Cheung mention anywhere. J.H. Cheung's actual site is cheungdentalassociates.com, whose address and phone (3941 75th St #103, Aurora IL 60504; 630-375-8380) match this record exactly. Only 3 doctors appear on-site vs. census provider_count of 5 — some NPI-registered providers may no longer be active there. No careers page exists; calling the office directly is the only route.

No official practice website exists for this location/domain -- the known_website field was a directory link (vitals.com) and a guessed domain (jamespottsdds.com) failed to resolve entirely. Every directory listing matching the exact address (5804 W Addison St) and phone (773-736-5525) instead identifies the practitioner as 'Henry M. Kotlinski, DDS,' not 'James K. Potts, DDS' -- the census name for this location may be stale, or ownership/tenancy changed. A separate 'James Potts DDS' record does exist in directories but at a different address (8214 W Addison) and different phone, so it looks unrelated to this specific location. Only a Facebook business page was located (no dedicated site); call required to confirm current provider and any hiring status.
